texto: On one occasion, he said "The Son of man [referring to himself] must be killed, and on the 3rd day be raised to life." Peter, in particular, would have no part in such talk, and (can you believe?) he actually took Jesus aside and rebuked him, Jesus, the only begotten Son of God! How would God ever use an obstinate man like this to proclaim the gospel?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Marty Engel: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “On one occasion, he said "The Son of man [referring to himself] must be killed, and on the 3rd da…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, christian, christianity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de christianity e five-minutes-to-easter.
